title: PORTLAND IMMIGRANT RIGHTS COALITION - 211info
text: PORTLAND IMMIGRANT RIGHTS COALITION PORTLAND IMMIGRANT RIGHTS COALITION Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides advocacy and services to protect and empower the immigrant community including a hotline to report local Immigration and Customs Enforcement (ICE) sightings, assistance with locating loved ones who have been detained or deported, education on immigrant rights including free Know Your Rights fliers and handouts, drop-in resource center, and information and referral to additional resources such as legal aid or accompaniment to check-ins at the ICE office. Also offers volunteer opportunities. 4122 S Moody Avenue Portland, OR 97239 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Resource Center: Monday-Friday 7:45am-noon Hotline: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week Email (888) 622-1510 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Hotline (888) 622-1510 Alternate (970) 940-9053 Non-Emergency Voicemail Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call, visit website, or walk in for more information. For urgent matters, call the hotline. For non-urgent matters call non-emergency voicemail line or text the hotline. FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: City of Portland SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 7:45am-noon TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Bus 35 & 40, Streetcar NS, Street & Paid Parking Services: Advocacy * Immigration Issues Drop In Centers * Immigration Issues Immigrant Rights Groups Legal Information Services * Immigration Issues Prisoner Locator Services * Undocumented People * Immigration Issues Specialized Information and Referral * Immigration Issues Volunteer Opportunities If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. PORTLAND IMMIGRANT RIGHTS COALITION
